meta.title: feat: improve DAG visualization in RisingWave UI
meta.body_summary: Replace RisingWave UI DAG visualization from D3/dagre to ReactFlow for adaptive layout, sub-DAG drill-down, and drag-and-drop, claiming better readability and performance on large DAGs.

perf_labels.notes: Devin replaced D3/dagre with ReactFlow; maintainer xxchan reviewed with screenshot saying it still doesn't work; PR closed after 7+ days inactivity.

change_scale_vs_repository.interpretation: At 1213 changed lines across 5 files, this is a medium-sized frontend refactor by absolute volume (650 lines in ReactFlowRelationGraph.tsx, 519 in package-lock). As a moderate incremental UI performance PR it was closed—not merged—because the maintainer found the feature non-functional.

review_details.concern_detail: Maintainer xxchan commented with a screenshot that the ReactFlow DAG visualization 'still doesn't work' (还是不 work) and gave a thumbs-down; no CHANGES_REQUESTED formal state but clear rejection of functionality.
review_details.performance_claim: ReactFlow improves readability and performance for large/complex DAGs versus D3/dagre, with adaptive layout and sub-DAG navigation.
review_details.rejection_signals: Maintainer functional rejection via screenshot; bot closed PR for 7+ days inactivity.

capability_boundary.boundary_notes: Complex frontend visualization swap (D3/dagre → ReactFlow) requires working interactive UI; Agent delivered a large component change but failed maintainer's hands-on validation.

detection_detail.code_reading: xxchan manually tested the UI, found it non-functional, and posted screenshot evidence; Copilot bot review only summarized the diff without blocking.

maintainer_practices.reproducibility_notes: PR body includes manual test steps (risedev, cluster setup) but no performance metrics; maintainer reproduction showed failure, not perf regression data.
maintainer_practices.regression_detail: No fix-in-PR cycle after maintainer rejection; Devin bot auto-closed after 7 days inactivity.

core_change_summary.description: Introduce ReactFlowRelationGraph.tsx replacing D3/dagre RelationGraph; update relation_graph.tsx and node.tsx imports; add reactflow dependency in package.json/package-lock.json.
core_change_summary.secondary_note: Most churn is the new ReactFlow component (650 lines) and lockfile updates (519 lines); page wiring changes are small.
change_trajectory: Initial commit: ReactFlow-based DAG visualization with layout and interaction features.
Prettier formatting and edge-creation logic fix commits.
Maintainer screenshot rejection; no further fixes; auto-closed for inactivity.

review_signals.summary: Copilot bot posted PR Overview summarizing ReactFlow migration; reviewed 4/5 files with no inline comments.
Commented that it still doesn't work (还是不 work) with thumbs-down and screenshot attachment.
review_signals.action_taken: No follow-up fix; PR eventually closed.

review_signals.summary: Devin bot announced automatic comment/CI assistance for write-access users.
Closing due to inactivity for more than 7 days.

collaboration_trajectory: Devin opened PR linked to issue with ReactFlow DAG rewrite (~650-line new component).
Copilot bot posted non-blocking overview review within ~15 minutes.
Maintainer xxchan rejected functionality with screenshot ~9 minutes later.
No substantive fix commits; Devin bot auto-closed after 7+ days (~198h total lifespan).
